Brand Launch

How to Start a Sportswear Brand in 2026: The Complete Step-by-Step Guide

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 14 min read
Home / Blog / How to Start a Sportswear Brand in 2026: The Complete Step-by-Step Guide

Sportswear is one of the most profitable niches in clothing. Brands like Gymshark (started from a garage, now valued at $1.4B), NOBULL, and Alphalete proved that with the right product and marketing, independent sportswear brands can achieve massive success. This guide walks you through launching your sportswear brand from scratch.

Step 1: Choose Your Niche

Don't try to be everything. Successful sportswear brands dominate a specific niche: CrossFit (NOBULL), women's gym wear (Gymshark), yoga (Lululemon), running (Tracksmith). Your niche determines your fabric selection, design aesthetic, and marketing strategy.

Step 2: Identify Your Target Customer

Be specific. "Women aged 25-40 who do CrossFit 4x per week and spend $150+/month on activewear" is much more actionable than "people who go to the gym." Understand their pain points with current options.

Step 3: Build Your Product Range

Start with 2-3 hero products, not 20 SKUs. For a women's gym brand: high-waist leggings + sports bra set. For a men's brand: training shorts + performance tee. Master these before expanding.

Step 4: Choose Your Manufacturer (Most Important)

Look for: ISO 9001 certification, low MOQ (50-100 pieces), performance fabric expertise, sample availability, and DDP shipping. FABRIOZA specializes in sportswear manufacturing from 50 pieces.

Step 5: Fabric Selection

Your fabric choice determines performance and customer satisfaction. For gym wear: polyester-spandex blend (88/12) for moisture-wicking and stretch. For yoga: nylon-spandex (82/18) for softness. Test samples during actual workouts.

Step 6: Branding

Develop your logo, color palette, and brand voice. Private label manufacturing means your branding appears on every garment from day one — woven labels, hangtags, and packaging.

Step 7: Sample and Production

Order samples from 2-3 manufacturers. Evaluate fit, fabric feel, construction quality, and customization accuracy. Approve the best sample and place your first production run (50-100 pieces).

Step 8: Pricing

Sportswear commands premium pricing. Cost of goods × 4-5 = retail price. A $20 manufacturing cost justifies $80-100 retail for performance activewear.

Step 9: Launch

Build anticipation on Instagram and TikTok before launch. Use influencer seeding (send free products to micro-influencers in your niche). Launch with a Shopify store and social commerce.

Common Mistakes

  • Launching with too many products — start with 2-3 heroes
  • Underpricing — sportswear customers expect to pay premium for quality
  • Ignoring fabric testing — performance matters more than aesthetics
  • Skipping the sample stage — always approve samples before bulk

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does it cost to start a sportswear brand?

$2,000-4,000 for a 50-piece launch including samples, production, shipping, and initial branding.

What is the best fabric for gym wear?

Polyester-spandex (88/12) for moisture-wicking performance. Nylon-spandex (82/18) for premium softness.

Should I start with men's or women's?

Women's activewear is a larger market but more competitive. Men's is growing fast with less saturation.

How do I find sportswear manufacturers?

Look for ISO 9001 certified factories with sportswear experience and low MOQ. FABRIOZA specializes in sportswear from 50 pieces.

What makes sportswear different from regular clothing?

Performance fabrics, compression technology, moisture-wicking, and construction designed for movement. Regular clothing prioritizes style over function.
